title: spongotrichum glandulosum
intro: Spongotrichum glandulosum, also known as the hairy club moss, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. Spongotrichum glandulosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
